name: Kio Kit
description: The Kio Kit is a di­gital edu­ca­tion tool­box en­abling schools in emer­ging mar­kets to ac­cess on­line edu­ca­tional tools for bet­ter learn­ing.

taxonomy.sub_category: Kio Kit Updated on June 9, 2024 · Created on October 7, 2018 Kio Kit The Kio Kit is a di­gital edu­ca­tion tool­box en­abling schools in emer­ging mar­kets to ac­cess on­line edu­ca­tional tools for bet­ter learn­ing. Developed By BRCK Tested By BRCK Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Kio kit is a ready-to-use box of digital education tools designed for schools in low-income communities in primarily emerging markets. The kits come packed with 40 Kio tablets, preloaded with engaging educational content divided into three key sections: academic content aligned to local curriculum, games that stimulate critical thinking, and content focused on responsible citizenship and environmental con­ser­va­tion. The case offers storage for the tablets as well as charging. The tablet can run multimedia content, has enough battery to manage intermittent power, and is ruggedized to reduce breakage. Kio tablets are locked to prevent theft and ensure digital child safety. Target SDGs SDG 4: Quality Education SDG 10: Reduced Inequalities Market Suggested Retail Price $5,000.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household Distributors / Implementing Organizations BRCK Manufacturing/Building Method The kit is manufactured in Kenya. Intellectural Property Type Copyright User Provision Model Users can obtain the product directly from BRCK. Distributions to Date Status Since 2013, BRCK has sold over 2,500 devices in 54 countries. Telecommunication service required Internet is provided by kio kit. Level of connection service needed WiFi is provided by kio kit. Device(s) required Tablets are provided by kio kit. Additional features required None Permanent network connectivity required (Y/N[specify],Other [specify]) No Two way communication (Y/N) Yes Usage rate (%) Unknown. Literacy support (Y (specify) /N) Yes Languages available (list) English Operating system and version Android 4.4 Power requirements Kio Kit can be powered from mains power, car battery or solar power. eEducation application Education equipment Design Specifications Kio Kit is an integrated education platform that consists of 40 Kio tablets, a SupaBRCK, and a hardened, water-resistant, lockable case that also offers wireless charging. The Kio Tablets are designed to be simple and easy-to-use for children and teachers, with the ability to tun multimedia content, enough battery to manage intermittent power, and ruggedized to reduce breakage. Kio tablets are locked to prevent theft and ensure digital child safety. The general specifications include: Screen size: 7” Resolution: 1024×600 Processor: 1.2 GHz, dual-core RAM: 1 GB Storage Space: 4GB Ruggedization: Drop resistant to 70cm, scratch, IP52 water, and dust resistant. The lockable case is portable is ruggedized and is used for secure storage of the tablets as well as charging. There is a single plug used to charge the Kit and one button to power on the entire system. Technical Support Provided by the manufacturer. Replacement Components Unknown Lifecycle Unknown Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters Designer specified performance targets include ruggedized, water-resistant, lockable, long battery life, and easy charging. Vetted Performance Status Testing performed by the manufacturer showed that after one year of use in a rural school, there were no incidences of a malfunctioning or broken screens. Safety No known safety hazards are related to this product. Complementary Technical Systems N/A Academic Research and References Ahmada, R., Abdulla, A., Yunus, S., Ismail, M., 2019, Teachers’ Perception on Using Kio-Kit to Enhance Teaching and Learning STEM Subjects in Zanzibar , Sustainable ICT, Education and Learning, pp. 135-144. Cass, S., 2016, CeBIT2016: The Kio Kit Is a Classroom in a Box , IEEE Spectrum Thomson, I., 2016, OERs taking Schools from Resource Poor to Resource Rich , PCF8 Conference Malaysia. “BRCK | Front Page.” n.d. March 16, 2016. https://spectrum.ieee.org/cebit2016-the-kio-kit-is-a-classroom-in-a-box Compliance with regulations BRCK has stated its product's compliance with Open Source Regulations. Evaluation methods Kio Kit has evaluated for durability and ease of use by both teachers and students. Other Information In November 2016, BRCK's Kio Kit was named top innovation at the ITU Telecom World Awards . Kio Kit was rated first in the Global SME Category of Awards . The Kio Kit won the Product Design category award at the 2017 iF Design Awards Leave a Reply You must be logged in to post a comment.
